# DSTsx

> Declarative Self-improving Language Programs in TypeScript — a 1:1 port of DSPy.

DSTsx lets you build **typed, composable LM pipelines** in TypeScript and then **optimize** their prompts and few-shot examples automatically — no manual prompt engineering required.

- **npm**: `@jaex/dstsx`
- **License**: MIT
- **Node.js**: 18+ required

## Docs

- [docs/overview.md](docs/overview.md): Installation, quick start, core concepts
- [docs/signatures.md](docs/signatures.md): `Signature`, `InputField`, `OutputField`, `FieldMeta`
- [docs/primitives.md](docs/primitives.md): `Example`, `Prediction`, `Trace`, `Image`, `Audio`, `History`, `Code`, `ToolCalls`, `majority()`
- [docs/lm-adapters.md](docs/lm-adapters.md): LM adapters (OpenAI, Anthropic, Cohere, GoogleAI, Ollama, LMStudio, HuggingFace, MockLM), `LMCallConfig`, `LMResponse`, streaming, disk cache
- [docs/settings.md](docs/settings.md): `settings.configure()`, `settings.context()`, `settings.save()`, `settings.load()`, `SettingsOptions`
- [docs/modules.md](docs/modules.md): `Predict`, `ChainOfThought`, `ChainOfThoughtWithHint`, `MultiChainComparison`, `ReAct`, `NativeReAct`, `ProgramOfThought`, `Retrieve`, `Retry`, `BestOfN`, `Ensemble`, `Parallel`, `Refine`, `TypedPredictor`, `TypedChainOfThought`, `CodeAct`, `Reasoning`, `RLM`
- [docs/retrievers.md](docs/retrievers.md): `ColBERTv2`, `PineconeRM`, `ChromadbRM`, `QdrantRM`, `WeaviateRM`, `FaissRM`, `YouRM`, `MockRetriever`
- [docs/optimizers.md](docs/optimizers.md): `LabeledFewShot`, `BootstrapFewShot`, `BootstrapFewShotWithRandomSearch`, `BootstrapRS`, `BootstrapFewShotWithOptuna`, `COPRO`, `MIPROv2`, `KNNFewShot`, `EnsembleOptimizer`, `BootstrapFinetune`, `GRPO`, `SIMBA`, `AvatarOptimizer`, `GEPA`, `BetterTogether`, `InferRules`
- [docs/evaluate.md](docs/evaluate.md): `evaluate()`, `exactMatch`, `f1`, `passAtK`, `bleu`, `rouge`, `answerExactMatch`, `answerPassageMatch`, `SemanticF1`, `CompleteAndGrounded`
- [docs/assertions.md](docs/assertions.md): `Assert`, `Suggest`, `AssertionError`, assertion + retry pattern
- [docs/tracking.md](docs/tracking.md): `Tracker`, `ConsoleTracker`, `JsonFileTracker`, custom trackers
- [docs/mcp.md](docs/mcp.md): `MCPToolAdapter`, `DSTsxMCPServer`
- [docs/examples.md](docs/examples.md): End-to-end code examples

## Additional

- [README.md](README.md): Full combined reference
- [EXTENSION.md](EXTENSION.md): DSPy parity specification
